Localization.Description: An attempt to change user rights or role is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} granted the right or role "{object.account.privileges}" to user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} made an attempt to grant the right or role "{object.account.privileges}" to user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
